title: AI Engineer

company_hook.phrase: BlackLine provides cloud software that automates and controls accounting

citation.supported_claim: BlackLine provides cloud software that automates and controls accounting

body_paragraphs.text: My background aligns with the practical responsibilities of this role. One documented example from my background is the following: Cross-functional collaboration with product and engineering teams. My experience in translating requirements into deployable AI and machine learning features aligns well with BlackLine's goals.
body_paragraphs.reason: Connects verified candidate evidence to the role requirements.

closing_sentence: Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can contribute to BlackLine's success.
